zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Astley於1366年出生在英國瓦維其可爾艾斯利時，她的父親Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley11363歲，母親Joan Willoughby21歲。她於大約1378年11月25日與Reynold Grey II結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1448年9月3日在威爾士丹比爾盧享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Astley于1366年出生在英国瓦維其可爾艾斯利时，她的父亲Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley11363岁，母亲Joan Willoughby21岁。她于大约1378年11月25日与Reynold Grey II结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1448年9月3日在威尔士丹比爾盧享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Astley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in England called Astley (in Lancashire, Shropshire, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and Yorkshire), from Old English ēast ‘east’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The modern surname seems to be particularly associated with the one in Warwickshire. See also Astle .

variants.name: Astle
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire called Astle, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + hyll ‘hill’. There may also have been some confusion with Asthall and Astley . Or occasionally this may be a topographic name denoting residence on an ‘east hill’ (from Middle English ast + hill or hull), i.e. a hill to the east of a settlement.
English: perhaps also a habitational name from Astwell, Northamptonshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + wielle ‘spring’.
English: habitational name from Asthall, Oxfordshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + halh ‘nook’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Astley was born in 1366, in Astley, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley, was 11363 and her mother, Joan Willoughby, was 21. She married Reynold Grey II about 25 November 1378. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 3 September 1448, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 82.

fr.Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, United King: Ruthin, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Astley est née en 1366, à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley, avait 11363 ans et sa mère, Joan Willoughby, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Reynold Grey II environ 25 novembre 1378. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 septembre 1448, à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Astley 1366 in Astley, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley 11363 und ihre Mutter Joan Willoughby 21. Sie hat um 25. November 1378 Reynold Grey II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. September 1448 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Astley(이)가 1366년 영국 워윅실르 애스틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley(은)는 11363세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Willoughby(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1378년 11월 25일 Reynold Grey II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1448년 9월 3일 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Astley nasceu em 1366, em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley, tinha 11363 anos e sua mãe, Joan Willoughby, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Reynold Grey II aproximadamente 25 de novembro de 1378. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1448, em Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Astley родилась в 1366 г. в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley было 11363 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Willoughby, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reynold Grey II около 25 ноября 1378 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 3 сентября 1448 г. в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Astley nació en 1366, en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley, tenía 11363 años y su mamá, Joan Willoughby, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Reynold Grey II aproximadamente 25 de noviembre de 1378. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1448, en Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, a la edad de 82 años.
